# Bimfalb Heritage

Official website: https://www.bimfalbheritage.org/
Organization type: Nigerian cultural heritage NGO

Mission:
- Preserve and promote Nigerian cultural heritage.
- Support local artists and creative communities.
- Document historic traditions across Africa.

Primary pages:
- Home: https://www.bimfalbheritage.org/
- About: https://www.bimfalbheritage.org/about
- Blog: https://www.bimfalbheritage.org/blog
- Events: https://www.bimfalbheritage.org/events
- Gallery: https://www.bimfalbheritage.org/gallery
- Contact: https://www.bimfalbheritage.org/contact

Contact:
- Email: bimfalbheritage@gmail.com
- Phone: +2348033842322
- Location: Akure, Ondo State, Nigeria
